Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Olbo Villagran's motion for assignment of rights and a restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
